services.name: Photos
services.description: Photo and video library with private login and public share-link support.
services.uploadNotes: Upload through Immich web or the mobile app.

services.name: Files
services.description: Browser file workspace backed by each user's restricted SFTP root.
services.uploadNotes: Use Files for general uploads and app-specific media folders.

services.name: SFTP Access
services.description: Private SFTP endpoint for large uploads and automated folder sync.
services.loginNotes: Use uploaded SFTP public key authentication and port 2222 on server.home.arpa.
services.uploadNotes: Upload your public key once, then connect with an SFTP client.

services.name: Backups
services.description: Kopia backup management for system state and repositories.
services.loginNotes: Requires backup-admins plus the native Kopia password.
services.uploadNotes: Backup repository files are managed by Kopia.

adminGuide.title: Guarded deploy
adminGuide.detail: Stage the repo archive and run the normal remote rebuild test path on the server.
